head.pred:
Risk Management and Strategy
We are focused on the growing threat of cybersecurity risks we face in today's global business environment and have identified
cybersecurity as an important enterprise risk. Our cybersecurity risk management program is part of our overall enterprise risk management program,
and focuses on identifying, assessing, managing, and remediating material risks from cybersecuri

items.title: Quantitative and Qualitative Disclosures About Market Risk

head.pred:
Risk Management and Market Sensitive Financial Instruments

We are exposed to many different market risks with the various industries we serve. The primary financial risk we are exposed to is foreign
currency exchange, as certain operations, assets and liabilities of ours are denominated in foreign currencies. We manage these risks through normal
operating and financing activities.
